agent_stats.outcome_reasoning:
The document defines an Article 4 Direction covering three distinct geographic areas in Peterborough: Woodston (Area 0), Hampton (Area 1), and the Park Area (Area 2). 

1. Woodston (Page 4) was matched with high confidence (2497 inliers) using Woodston Primary School as an anchor. 
2. Park Area (Page 6) was matched (570 inliers) using Park Crescent. Although the scale consistency was marginal (0.37), the RANSAC strength and road agreement (58%) confirm a correct spatial lock on the Central Park vicinity.
3. Hampton Area (Page 5) was matched using Eagle Way. This area returned a weaker match (37 inliers) due to the very wide scale (1:9,000) and sparse cartographic detail in the new-build residential estates, but the location is correct based on the road names and Serpentine Lake landmark.

All three areas have been committed and unioned into the final result.
